text.title: Scope Management Examples
text.summary: Worked scope statement snippet for a checkout redesign.

example.title: Checkout redesign scope statement
example.context: Q2 checkout-redesign delivery; fixed-bid contract; one-sponsor.
example.code:
## In scope - Refactor payment intent flow to use Stripe Payment Intents API v2. - Add Apple Pay button on cart + checkout pages. - Migrate guest-checkout cookie to JWT-based session token.
## Out of scope (explicit exclusions) - Loyalty / rewards programme integration. - Refund automation pipeline. - Mobile-app payment flow (separate epic).
## Acceptance criteria (testable) - AC-001: p95 latency for payment confirmation < 500ms in canary for 14 days. - AC-002: Apple Pay button rendered on iOS Safari + macOS Safari, hidden elsewhere. - AC-003: Guest sessions persist via JWT with 24h expiry, no cookies set.
## RTM | REQ-ID | Source | Acceptance test | Status | |--------|---------------|-----------------|--------| | REQ-1 | charter §3.1 | AC-001 | open | | REQ-2 | charter §3.2 | AC-002 | open | | REQ-3 | charter §3.3 | AC-003 | open |
example.commentary: Three reqs mapped to testable AC; explicit out-of-scope list closes adjacent-feature ambiguity; baseline signed by VP Engineering on 2026-04-01.
